case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS LARSON, NANCY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,300.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON, NANCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
